Name: Zurich International School
Tagline: At ZIS Middle School (Zurich, Switzerland), we offer an inclusive international and bilingual education, personal learning journeys, and prepare students for success in Switzerland and beyond.
About: As a parent, I understand the quiet hope we all carry—that our children will grow into kind, grounded people who chase their questions and live with purpose. At ZIS, we hold those hopes with you.
Philosophy: Every day, we nurture curiosity, critical thinking, and a love for learning—so students grow into changemakers in their families, their communities, and the world. Learning at ZIS includes character, wellbeing, and the confidence to navigate a complex world.
Outcomes: Whether a student is planning to go to university, a gap year, military service or pursue other options, the Upper School University and Career Counselors provide personalized assistance in that transition. At ZIS, every upper school student receives highly individualized and comprehensive support throughout their journey.
Admissions: Our Admissions Team is here to help you through the process of making the best choice for your child's future. Our Admissions Team can guide you at every stage of the application process.
Quote: Isabella explored her Colombian roots through the Barefoot Service Club.

Performance.Student Wellbeing: In addition students can participate in the annual Middle School musical which is a tremendous event in full costume performed to the ZIS Community. The shows are always a highlight of the school year and students perform to a sell-out audience over 4 performances in a week.
Performance.Academic Integration: Students explore, discover, experience, develop and express their ideas using the visual arts. Exposure to different media and opportunity for individual expression welcomes diverse interpretations and varied outcomes.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Drama is offered as an elective course in Grade 6-8 and students study choral speech, creative movement, mask and musical theater. Student work is showcased at our Winter and Spring Arts festival.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: We are offering an in-person, pre-college, project-based artificial intelligence program through Inspirit AI, an AI education program developed and taught by Stanford and MIT alumni, on weekdays from July 20-August 1, 2026.
Performance.Coaching Credentials: Zurich International School's faculty comprises educators with IB certification and diverse international backgrounds, ensuring a rich, multicultural learning environment. Many teachers hold advanced degrees and specialize in fostering inquiry-based learning.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress at ZIS is meticulously tracked through regular progress reports and parent-teacher conferences. As an IB-accredited institution, the school maintains rigorous standards and a robust advisory system to support student development.
